Home›All services›Google Workspace Setup
✦

Simple cloud collaboration

Google Workspace Setup

Build a clean Google Workspace environment for business email, shared files, calendars, and meetings.

Ask about this service →

What this service solves

A practical setup your team can use with confidence.

We configure Google Workspace so staff can find what they need without exposing information too broadly. That includes business email, groups, shared drives, calendars, account security, and practical administrative controls.

✉Questions before you begin?support@steadydeskit.com

What is included

Focused support, clearly scoped.

  • ✓Domain and Workspace configuration
  • ✓Business Gmail accounts and groups
  • ✓Shared drives and access structure
  • ✓Calendar and meeting setup
  • ✓Two-step verification
  • ✓Data migration and user guidance

Business outcomes

What improves for your team.

✓

Consistent business communication

✓

Organized team file sharing

✓

Safer account access

✓

Simple administration as the team grows

Simple collaboration, clear control

Google Workspace without the scattered drives and mystery access.

A browser-based workspace can feel simple while still hiding ownership and security gaps. We organize accounts, shared drives, groups, calendars, and administrator access so collaboration remains convenient without becoming uncontrolled.

Professional company accounts

We connect the domain, create role-appropriate users and groups, and separate personal ownership from business information.

Shared files that stay with the business

Shared drives and permissions are arranged so key work does not disappear when an employee account changes or closes.

Meetings and schedules that connect

Calendars, rooms, video meetings, delegation, and shared scheduling are configured around real team routines.

Workspace foundation

What we organize before the team depends on it.

We plan the workspace around company ownership, employee roles, and the information that must remain available. The result is easier to explain to staff and easier to administer later.

Administrative ownership

Primary and backup administrators, billing contacts, recovery methods, and domain control are verified and documented.

Users, groups, and roles

We map who needs an individual account, who receives group mail, and who can manage specific services.

Sharing boundaries

Internal, external, and public sharing settings are reviewed so everyday collaboration does not quietly expose company files.

Migration and handover

Mail, calendars, contacts, and drive content are moved in a controlled sequence with user guidance and completion checks.

How the work moves forward

Three clear stages, with no mystery in the middle.

✓

Review

We learn how your team communicates, stores files, and shares calendars.

✓

Build

The domain, users, groups, drives, policies, and security are configured.

✓

Move and verify

Data is migrated where needed, then access and mail flow are tested.

A good fit for

Support designed around real small-business conditions.

  • ✓Teams that prefer Gmail and Google Drive
  • ✓Startups formalizing business accounts
  • ✓Businesses consolidating scattered Google files
Discuss your situation →

Common questions

Can personal Gmail data be moved?+

In many cases, mail, calendars, contacts, and Drive files can be transferred or reorganized. We assess ownership and sharing before the move.

Can we limit who sees shared files?+

Yes. We design groups and shared-drive access around roles, then review external-sharing settings with you.

Planning Google Workspace?

Organize the workspace around your real team.

Tell us what you use today, which accounts and files need to move, and how employees collaborate. We will reply with the decisions needed before setup begins.

Contact our team The secure contact form opens on the Contact page.
